title: Modern Glass Hotbar
description: A sleek, transparent hotbar pairing modern design with a soft glass aesthetic for Minecraft.
body:
![Stylized digital artwork of a sleek, transparent glass hotbar centered on the right over a blurred, abstract Minecraft-inspired background. The minimalist design features a subtle frosted glass effect with no slot separators, highlighting a modern, clean aesthetic.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecd8b1dc8829d9e939a7b443b982387507a67ad8_0.webp)

Modern Glass Hotbar gives your Minecraft experience a fresh, minimalst look by transforming your hotbar into a sleek, glass-like strip with no separators or distracting elements. Perfect for players who love modern design, clean UIs and want an immersive, distraction-free gameplay experience.

Features:
- Transparent, glassy hotbar with a frosted look
- No slot separators for a seamless minimalist design
- Optimized for survival, creative, and hardcore gamemode


Installation:

  1. Download the pack.
  2. Place it in your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder.
  3. Enable it in-game through the Resource Packs menu.
